title: The Mystery of the Missing Eggs
synopsis: Nia helps solve the mystery of missing ostrich eggs in the African savanna by following clues and working with various animals to discover the unexpected truth.

pages.text: Nia loved living on the savanna. Every morning, she would walk through the tall golden grass to visit her animal friends. Today felt different. Something was wrong.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking through golden savanna grass at sunrise. The gouache painting shows thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset colors with textured painterly golden grass swaying in the breeze.
illustration.alt: Nia walking through golden savanna grass

pages.text: Near the big acacia tree, Nia found Mama Ostrich crying. 'My eggs are gone!' she sobbed. 'I left them safe in my nest this morning. Now they have disappeared!'

illustration.description: A large ostrich with sad eyes talking to a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes. The gouache painting uses bold confident strokes to show the acacia tree and expressive animals in warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Mama Ostrich crying to Nia about her missing eggs

pages.text: 'Don't worry, Mama Ostrich,' said Nia kindly. 'I will help you find your eggs. Let's look for clues together.' Nia was good at solving mysteries.

illustration.description: A determined young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes kneeling beside an empty nest in golden grass. The textured painterly gouache style shows thick brushstrokes and warm savanna colors with the nest clearly visible.
illustration.alt: Nia examining the empty ostrich nest

pages.text: Around the empty nest, Nia saw strange marks in the dirt. They were long and wavy, like someone had dragged something heavy through the sand.

illustration.description: Close-up view of wavy tracks in sandy soil with a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes pointing at the marks. The gouache painting shows textured painterly brushstrokes capturing the detail of the mysterious tracks.
illustration.alt: Nia discovering wavy tracks near the nest

pages.text: Nia followed the wavy tracks across the savanna. The tracks led past the watering hole where the zebras drank. 'Have you seen anything strange?' Nia asked them.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes talking to three zebras at a watering hole. The gouache painting uses bold confident strokes and warm savanna colors with expressive animals and golden grass in the background.
illustration.alt: Nia asking zebras about the missing eggs

pages.text: 'Yes!' said the biggest zebra. 'Early this morning, we saw something long and brown moving through the grass. It was carrying something white and round.'

illustration.description: An expressive zebra with wide eyes speaking to a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes. The textured painterly gouache style shows thick brushstrokes and warm orange sunset colors in the background.
illustration.alt: Zebra telling Nia what they saw

pages.text: The tracks continued toward the rocky hills. Nia climbed carefully, following the wavy trail. At the top of a small hill, she met Oliver the wise old owl.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes climbing rocky hills while following tracks. A wise owl perches on a rock nearby. The gouache painting shows bold confident strokes and textured painterly warm savanna colors.
illustration.alt: Nia climbing hills and meeting Oliver the owl

pages.text: 'I saw everything from up here,' hooted Oliver. 'The creature with the eggs went into that cave down there. But Nia, be careful. It might not be what you think.'

illustration.description: An expressive owl pointing with his wing toward a cave entrance while talking to a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes. The gouache painting uses thick brushstrokes and golden grass surrounding the mysterious cave opening.
illustration.alt: Oliver the owl pointing toward the cave

pages.text: Nia walked quietly to the cave entrance. Inside, she could hear soft scraping sounds. She peeked around the corner and gasped at what she saw.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes carefully peering around a cave entrance. The gouache painting shows warm savanna colors and thick brushstrokes creating shadows and mystery in the cave opening.
illustration.alt: Nia looking into the mysterious cave

pages.text: There was Sally the python, but she wasn't eating the eggs! She was carefully cleaning them with her coils and keeping them warm and safe.

illustration.description: A gentle python carefully coiled around three large white eggs in a cave, with a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes watching in surprise. The textured painterly gouache style shows expressive animals and warm golden light filtering into the cave.
illustration.alt: Sally the python protecting the ostrich eggs

pages.text: 'Sally!' called Nia. 'Why do you have Mama Ostrich's eggs?' Sally looked up sadly. 'I found them rolling toward the cliff. I saved them, but now I don't know how to get them back safely.'

illustration.description: A sad python talking to a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes in a cave with three eggs nearby. The gouache painting uses bold confident strokes and warm savanna colors to show the emotional conversation between friends.
illustration.alt: Sally explaining why she took the eggs

pages.text: 'You're a hero, Sally!' said Nia. 'Let's work together to bring them home.' Nia carefully carried one egg while Sally gently moved the others with her coils.

illustration.description: A young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes carrying a large white egg while a friendly python helps move two other eggs. The textured painterly gouache shows thick brushstrokes and golden grass as they travel together across the savanna.
illustration.alt: Nia and Sally working together to return the eggs

pages.text: When they reached Mama Ostrich, she was so happy! 'Thank you both for saving my babies!' she cried. 'Sally, you are welcome to visit anytime.' Nia smiled. Another mystery solved!

illustration.description: A joyful reunion scene with a happy ostrich, a smiling python, and a young girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing together near a nest with three eggs. The gouache painting uses warm orange sunset colors and expressive animals celebrating together in the golden grass.
illustration.alt: Happy reunion with Mama Ostrich and her returned eggs

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What was missing from Mama Ostrich's nest?
questions.explanation: Mama Ostrich was crying because her eggs had disappeared from her nest.

questions.question: What kind of tracks did Nia find near the empty nest?
questions.explanation: Nia saw long and wavy tracks in the dirt, like something heavy had been dragged.

questions.question: Which animal told Nia they saw something brown moving through the grass?
questions.explanation: The zebras at the watering hole told Nia they saw something long and brown carrying something white and round.

questions.question: Why did Sally the python take the eggs?
choices: She saved them from rolling off a cliff
questions.explanation: Sally explained that she found the eggs rolling toward the cliff and saved them to keep them safe.

questions.question: How did Nia and Sally work together to return the eggs?
choices: Nia carried one egg while Sally moved the others
They rolled all the eggs together
Sally carried Nia and all the eggs
questions.explanation: Nia carefully carried one egg while Sally gently moved the other two eggs with her coils.
